en: me who I was had nothing to do with it because if they were curious they would
ask questions you know questions like have you played a lot of darts Ted
ko: 질문을 했을 테니까. 있잖아, 이런 질문 말이야. 다트 많이 쳐봤어, Ted?

en: which I would have answered yes sir every Sunday afternoon at a sports bar
ko: 그랬으면 이렇게 대답했을 거야. 네, 매주 일요일 오후마다 스포츠 바에서

en: with my father from age 10 to 16 when he passed away barbecue sauce
ko: 아버지랑 10살부터 16살까지, 아버지가 돌아가실 때까지요. 바비큐 소스.

en: you are very lovely consolation prize Rebecca Ted enjoy your evening my as
ko: 당신은 아주 사랑스러운 위로의 상이에요, Rebecca. Ted, 좋은 저녁 보내.

en: always only one thing left to do now what's that
ko: 항상 이제 남은 건 하나뿐이야. 뭔데?
